title: Cyberpunk Nocturne
description: An exploration of urban isolation in a hyper-connected future, inspired by the neon-drenched streets of Neo-Tokyo.

title: Ephemeral Echoes
description: A series of landscape studies focusing on the fleeting nature of light in the high altitudes of the Himalayas.

title: The Silent Observer
description: A high-contrast study of emotion and silence through traditional medium, focusing on the eyes as the window to the soul.

title: Minimalist Flow
description: Exploring the intersection of geometry and organic movement in a restricted color palette.

title: Neon Reverie
description: A dreamlike state captured in vibrant colors, pushing the boundaries of surrealism in a digital space.

title: Stellar Horizon
description: Envisioning the first colony on a distant exoplanet, balancing scientific plausibility with artistic wonder.
